summary: A subtitled clip of an old CNN interview of Barack Obama answering a question about unemployment among African-Americans, repurposed with word-by-word caption overlays to make a political point about a 'pathway to' citizenship and worker conditions. It is lightly-edited archival news footage with no music or audio track and no stylized genre treatment. Out of scope as a youth-appeal produced spectacle.
notable_text: NOW THERE IS; WORKER CONDITIONS; CONTINUE TO; WHO THEY ARE; PATHWAY TO; QUESTION: HOW WOULD YOU ADDRESS UNEMPLOYMENT FOR AFRICAN-AMERICANS RELATED...
